headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Musk’s attorney apologizes for his absence at trial during closing arguments
headlines.description: Elon Musk had traveled to China with President Donald Trump even though the judge said he wasn’t excused.

headlines.title: A judge told Musk he wasn’t excused from trial. He went to China with Trump anyway.
headlines.description: Elon Musk traveled to China with President Donald Trump, despite the trial over his lawsuit with OpenAI and a judge’s order that he remain ready to be recalled.

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.

headlines.title: Sam Altman testifies at trial that Elon Musk ‘tried to kill’ OpenAI twice
headlines.description: Altman is defending himself against Musk’s claims that he’s trying to enrich himself at the expense of OpenAI’s original nonprofit mission.

headlines.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras soars 90% in year’s biggest IPO so far
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras surged 90% in its trading debut, setting the bar for the biggest initial public stock offering of the year so far.

headlines.title: Authorities say she asked ChatGPT about mixing alcohol and meds. Then, two men turned up dead.
headlines.description: Kim So-young is accused of asking ChatGPT for lethal dosing advice before giving three men benzodiazepine-laced drinks. Two died.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows abortion pill to remain available by mail
headlines.description: The Supreme Court ordered that patients could receive the abortion pill mifepristone through the mail and without an in-person appointment with a clinician after a ruling by the New Orleans-based 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals on May 1 had imperiled widespread access to the pill.

headlines.title: Trump’s high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: China’s leader gave President Trump a lavish welcome in Tiananmen Square as the superpower summit began. Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas that key topics included Iran, Taiwan and trade deals.

headlines.title: Exclusive look at Chinese pandas preparing for trip to America
headlines.description: In the latest round of panda diplomacy playing out between the U.S. and China, NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer got exclusive access to the two pandas getting ready for their upcoming journey to Zoo Atlanta in America.

headlines.title: Families of Americans imprisoned in China appeal to Trump for help
headlines.description: After living without their loved ones for more than a decade, two families of Americans detained in China are appealing to President Donald Trump to bring them home as he meets with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing.

headlines.title: Inside China’s race to dominate humanoid robotics
headlines.description: Tom Llamas goes inside a Beijing robot plant as China’s race to build autonomous humanoids accelerates, raising new questions about whether the U.S. can keep pace in the next generation of robotics.
